prestazioni: Installation of a Koenigsegg-developed twin-turbo system utilizing Garrett GT55R turbos (engine code: Koenigsegg 5.0L V8 TFG - Twin-Forged with 4 valves per cylinder, 90° V-angle) with billet compressor wheels, titanium nitride-coated turbine housings, and 106mm compressor wheels to push boost levels to 1.8 bar (26 psi) for a targeted 1,300+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with a bespoke titanium exhaust manifold and 3.5-inch Inconel downpipes from Akrapović’s ‘Superleggera’ line, featuring a straight-pipe design with electronically actuated bypass valves for optimized backpressure management

Full fuel system overhaul with dual Bosch Motorsport MS25 high-flow fuel pumps (350 LPH each), upgraded fuel lines with -8 AN PTFE-lined hoses from Earl’s Performance, and a set of 12x ID1000cc/min Injector Dynamics fuel injectors, calibrated via a Motec M150 ECU with custom Koenigsegg-specific maps for direct port injection and sequential multi-point ignition control, ensuring stoichiometric AFR at 12.5:1 under full load

Chassis reinforcement and drivetrain upgrades including a Koenigsegg-designed carbon-fiber torque tube with a 3D-printed titanium differential housing, paired with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (85% lockup under load), and a set of upgraded half-shafts from GKN Driveline with tripod CV joints rated for 1,500 Nm of torque, complemented by Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and spherical bearing top mounts for precise alignment under extreme lateral G-forces
estetica: Full carbon-fiber widebody conversion using Koenigsegg’s ‘Agera RS’ aero package, featuring a 3D-scanned and CNC-milled front splitter with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via hydraulic actuators), side skirts with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling, and a rear diffuser with a 5-element design and vortex generators, all constructed from pre-preg autoclave-cured carbon fiber with a 2x2 twill weave finish

Custom ‘Ghost’ paint scheme by Sikkens (AkzoNobel) using their ‘Autowave’ technology, applying a base layer of ‘Crystal Silver’ followed by a translucent ‘Liquid Chrome’ mid-coat, topped with a hand-polished ‘Diamond Clear’ topcoat for a depth effect exceeding 120 microns, with pinstriping by renowned artist Alan Johnson in ‘Electric Blue’ and ‘Neon Purple’ to accentuate the carbon weave under specific lighting conditions

Interior rework featuring a full Alcantara headliner and door cards by Katzkin, with contrast stitching in ‘Ferrari Rosso’ using 1.2mm waxed lacing thread, a custom roll cage by Matter Fab with a 4-point harness bar integrated into the carbon-fiber monocoque, and a bespoke infotainment system using a Raspberry Pi 4-based touchscreen running Koenigsegg’s proprietary ‘Agera OS’ with real-time telemetry overlay, paired with a Bang & Olufsen Beosound Stage sound system with 18 speakers and a 2,400W amplifier
